name: Arroz Amarillo Con Camarones-Yellow Rice & S
recipeIngredient: 1 large Ripe tomato, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a 3-quart casserole with lid. An earthenware casserole is preferable, especially if adding a touch of Spain to a dinner party.
2. Heat olive oil in the casserole.
3. Sauté onion and pepper until transparent.
4. Add garlic, parsley, tomato, bay leaf, nutmeg, cumin, and thyme. Mix well and cover, cooking over low heat until mushy (about 15 minutes).
5. Toast saffron on the lid in the brown paper.
6. Add shrimp to the sauté and cook until pink.
7. Dissolve saffron in 1 cup hot water. Combine with wine, lemon juice, salt, and hot sauce.
8. Pour into casserole, stir to mix, and cover.
9. Cook covered for 10 minutes more at 325°F.
10. Add rice and the remaining 2 1/2 cups of water. Distribute ingredients well in the casserole.
11. Bring to a quick boil, stirring once, and place in preheated oven for only 20 minutes.
12. Remove from oven, uncover, and garnish with peas, pimientos, and parsley.
13. Pour beer over all. Cover again and allow to stand for 15 minutes longer before serving.
